phrases.text_local: Para onde vai a Rua da Igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: PAH-rah OHN-jee VY-ah ah ROO-ah dah ee-GRAY-zhah?

likely_response.local: A Rua da Igreja leva à Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Pederneira.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH ROOUH DUH eeg-REH-zhuh LEH-vuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH peh-dih-ruh-NAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Rua da Igreja leads to the Church of Our Lady of Pederneira.

responses.english: Rua da Igreja leads to the Church of Our Lady of Pederneira.
responses.phonetic: AH ROOUH DUH eeg-REH-zhuh LEH-vuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH peh-dih-ruh-NAY-ruh.
responses.french: A Rua da Igreja leva à Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Pederneira.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o leilão de peixe no mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW lay-LOWN DIH PAY-shih NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?

likely_response.local: O leilão de peixe é no Mercado Municipal de Peixe. Pergunte ao vendedor de peixe ou ao guia local para mais informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW lay-LOWN DIH PAY-shih EH NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL DIH PAY-shih. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR DIH PAY-shih OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL PUH-ruh MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: The fish auction is at the Municipal Fish Market. Ask the fish seller or the local guide for more information.

responses.english: The fish auction is at the Municipal Fish Market. Ask the fish seller or the local guide for more information.
responses.phonetic: AW lay-LOWN DIH PAY-shih EH NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL DIH PAY-shih. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR DIH PAY-shih OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL PUH-ruh MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: O leilão de peixe é no Mercado Municipal de Peixe. Pergunte ao vendedor de peixe ou ao guia local para mais informações.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Pederneira fishing port?
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o Porto de Pesca de Pederneira?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee SEE lo-ka-LEE-zah-oo POR-too-jee PES-kah-jee peh-dehr-NAY-rah [link "de" as "jee" before consonants]
phrases.cultural_note: Active harbor where traditional wooden boats dock daily for fresh catches.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, segue junto à orla marítima.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEH-gih ZHOONNG-too AH AW-ruh-luh muh-REE-tee-muh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it runs along the waterfront.

responses.english: Good morning, it runs along the waterfront.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEH-gih ZHOONNG-too AH AW-ruh-luh muh-REE-tee-muh.
responses.french: Bom dia, segue junto à orla marítima.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Nossa Senhora da Pederneira Church?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Pederneira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH peh-dih-ruh-NAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic parish church serving as the spiritual center of the fishing quarter.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na Rua da Igreja.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's on Igreja Street.

responses.english: Good morning, it's on Igreja Street.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica na Rua da Igreja.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a mesa de leilão do mercado de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH MEH-zuh DIH lay-LOWN DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal de Peixe, no Largo da Pederneira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL DIH PAY-shih, NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH peh-dih-ruh-NAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Municipal Fish Market, in Largo da Pederneira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Municipal Fish Market, in Largo da Pederneira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL DIH PAY-shih, NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH peh-dih-ruh-NAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal de Peixe, no Largo da Pederneira.

phrases.text_local: Para onde leva a Rua da Igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: PUH-ruh OHNG-dih LEH-vuh AH ROOUH DUH eeg-REH-zhuh?

likely_response.local: A Rua da Igreja leva à Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Pederneira.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH ROOUH DUH eeg-REH-zhuh LEH-vuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH peh-dih-ruh-NAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Rua da Igreja leads to the Church of Our Lady of Pederneira.

responses.english: Rua da Igreja leads to the Church of Our Lady of Pederneira.
responses.phonetic: AH ROOUH DUH eeg-REH-zhuh LEH-vuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH peh-dih-ruh-NAY-ruh.
responses.french: A Rua da Igreja leva à Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Pederneira.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o Cais dos Pescadores?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW KEYESH DOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional docking area central to the local seafood trade and boat repairs.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Cais dos Pescadores.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fishermen's Wharf.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fishermen's Wharf.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Cais dos Pescadores.
